content:
- Executed task .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/01-task-core-types-time-errors-watch-channel.md in NOW EXECUTE mode.
- Implemented new Rust state primitives from scratch: src/lib.rs, src/state/{mod,ids,time,errors,watch_state}.rs and tests/bdd_state_watch.rs.
- Added typed watch wrappers with Versioned<T>, publish/latest/changed APIs, typed recv/publish errors, and WorkerStatus.
- Added deterministic tokio tests for version increments, initial snapshot, changed notifications, recv closed behavior, and publisher/subscriber snapshot parity.
- Validation passed: `cargo test watch_state --all-targets`, `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, and `make lint`.
- Updated task checklist to done with <passes>true</passes> and <passing>true</passing>, ran task switch, and recorded learnings in CLAUDE.md.
- Next should continue with next task in story-rust-system-harness pipeline.

- Read current task list and applied selection rules.
- Found multiple <passes>false</passes> tasks; story-rust-system-harness contains ultra_high chain and task 01 is done.
- Selected next unblocked ultra_high in chain: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/02-task-runtime-config-schema-defaults-parse-validate.md and wrote it to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt and loaded task .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/02-task-runtime-config-schema-defaults-parse-validate.md.
- Followed user workflow phase-gating: since no phase marker existed, executed planning-only mode.
- Researched current crate state (src/state module, tests, Makefile, and RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md config signatures) and wrote a detailed execution plan into the task file.
- Added terminal marker `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of task file and intentionally stopped before any implementation.
- Noted one process caveat: cannot actually spawn 5-15 or 16+ literal subagents in this environment, but used parallel command exploration where possible.
- Next step for next turn: detect `TO BE VERIFIED`, perform deep skeptical review, alter at least one plan item, then switch marker to `NOW EXECUTE` only when confident.

- Saw task 02 in TO BE VERIFIED phase, performed skeptical plan review, and tightened plan assumptions around required-field handling, unknown-key rejection, and targeted test command.
- Switched marker to NOW EXECUTE, implemented full config module (`schema/defaults/parser/mod`) plus crate wiring and tests.
- Added strict TOML parsing with `serde(deny_unknown_fields)`, optional-only defaults, and validation for binary paths, timeout bounds, DCS requirements, and HA lease-vs-loop invariant.
- All required commands passed: `cargo test config --all-targets`, `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`.
- Updated task 02 checkboxes/tags to done and passing, wrote AGENTS learnings, and prepared to task-switch and commit all current repo changes.
- Next immediate action after this entry: run `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`, stage all files, and commit with required message format.
